steps.description: Enter ${{env:M365_ACCOUNT_NAME}} into the email or username input field on the Microsoft Sign in page at login.microsoftonline.com in a Chrome browser.
Click the blue "Next" button on the Microsoft login page under the "Sign in" section, after entering the email address in Google Chrome.
Type ${{secret:M365_ACCOUNT_PASSWORD}} into the 'Password' field on the Microsoft login page for user ${{env:M365_ACCOUNT_NAME}}.
Press the "Enter" key to submit the login form on the Microsoft password entry screen labeled "Enter password."
